breakdown: PR adds normalization logic to handle non-standard rewards_box keys ('xp'/'xp_pieces' fallback to 'xp_gained'/'gold') in streaming passthrough. The function properly deep-copies and normalizes before persistence. Test is comprehensive E2E using real LLM. Type safety is weaker due to implicit typing, and the new function lacks a docstring explaining its purpose.
key_changes: Add normalize_rewards_box_for_ui() function with key fallback logic (xp→xp_gained, gold_pieces→gold)
Modify branching logic to use raw_structured_rewards_box in non-level-up path
Pop normalized keys after coercion to prevent raw key persistence
